info.title: LMS API
info.description: Learning Management System API for managing educational programs, courses, and student progress.

post.summary: Create a new user with all related data
post.description: Creates a user with profile, and role-specific data (tutor/student) in a single operation. Requires user:create permission.

put.summary: Update user with all related data
put.description: Updates a user with profile and role-specific data (tutor/student) in a single operation. Requires user:update permission.

post.summary: Create a new tenant with admin user
post.description: Creates a new tenant/organization along with an admin user who will manage the tenant
Public endpoint for new students to start their application. Sends verification email.

get.description: Validates the token from the email link and returns the application form fields

post.description: Submits the application with the form data. Creates user and student records.
Resends the verification email with a new token

get.description: Admin endpoint to list all applicants for a tenant

200.description: List of applicants for the cohort

post.description: Renders the template with the provided variables

get.description: Returns role-appropriate dashboard data for the authenticated user
Returns paginated audit logs with optional filtering. Super Admins can see all logs, other users see only their tenant's logs.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Filter by tenant ID (Super Admin only)

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter logs from this date (ISO 8601 or YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter logs until this date (ISO 8601 or YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: min_status
parameters.description: Filter by minimum HTTP status code

parameters.name: max_status
parameters.description: Filter by maximum HTTP status code

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for audit logs

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Filter by tenant ID (Super Admin only)

200.description: List of terms for the cohort

TenantInfo.description: Basic tenant information returned with login for non-super-admin users

tenant.description: Tenant info, included for non-super-admin users only

tenant_id.description: Tenant ID (uses current user's tenant if omitted)

UpdateUserFullInput.description: Comprehensive update input for user with all related data

ProfileInput.description: Profile data for creating/updating user profile

AvailabilityInput.description: A time slot when the tutor is available

admin_name.description: Name of the tenant admin user

admin_email.description: Email for the tenant admin user

admin_password.description: Password for the tenant admin user

RecipientType.description: Type of recipient group for bulk emails

recipient_type.description: Type of recipient group. Defaults to DIRECT if not specified

recipients.description: Direct email addresses (required when recipient_type is DIRECT)

grade.description: Nigerian grading: A, B, C, D, E, F

DashboardData.description: Role-based dashboard data - only one of super_admin, admin, tutor, or student will be populated based on user role

SuperAdminDashboard.description: Super Admin dashboard - Focus: Business health, infrastructure, and growth

AdminDashboard.description: Admin dashboard - Focus: Operational efficiency, compliance, and internal growth

TutorDashboard.description: Tutor dashboard - Focus: Student engagement and workload management

at_risk_students.description: Students who haven't logged in for X days

StudentDashboard.description: Student dashboard - Focus: Personal progress and 'What do I do next?'

course_progress.description: Visual percentage bars for enrolled courses

recent_grades.description: Quick view of latest feedback received

continue_learning.description: Jump Back In button linked to last lesson viewed

AuditLog.description: An audit log entry recording a system action

resource_id.description: The ID of the specific resource affected

user_email.description: Email of the user who performed the action

user_name.description: Name of the user who performed the action

logs_by_action.description: Count of logs grouped by action type

logs_by_resource.description: Count of logs grouped by resource

logs_by_status_code.description: Count of logs grouped by status code (2xx, 4xx, 5xx)
